channel.title: GitHub Ruby Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Ruby in GitHub

item.title: solidusio/solidus
item.description: 🛒 Solidus, the open-source eCommerce framework for industry trailblazers.

item.title: zammad/zammad
item.description: Zammad is a web based open source helpdesk/customer support system

item.title: rails/rails
item.description: Ruby on Rails

item.title: rails/solid_queue
item.description: Database-backed Active Job backend

item.title: CanCanCommunity/cancancan
item.description: The authorization Gem for Ruby on Rails.

item.title: heartcombo/devise
item.description: Flexible authentication solution for Rails with Warden.

item.title: sidekiq/sidekiq
item.description: Simple, efficient background processing for Ruby

item.title: ViewComponent/view_component
item.description: A framework for building reusable, testable & encapsulated view components in Ruby on Rails.

item.title: department-of-veterans-affairs/vets-api
item.description: API powering VA.gov

item.title: instructure/canvas-lms
item.description: The open LMS by Instructure, Inc.

item.title: DataDog/dd-trace-rb
item.description: Datadog Tracing Ruby Client

item.title: hashicorp/vagrant
item.description: Vagrant is a tool for building and distributing development environments.

item.title: stripe/stripe-ruby
item.description: Ruby library for the Stripe API.

item.title: teamcapybara/capybara
item.description: Acceptance test framework for web applications

item.title: paper-trail-gem/paper_trail
item.description: Track changes to your rails models

item.title: spree/spree
item.description: An open source eCommerce platform giving you full control and customizability. Modular and API-first. Multi-vendor, multi-tenant, multi-store, multi-currency, multi-language. Built using Ruby on Rails. Developed by @vendo-dev

item.title: github/choosealicense.com
item.description: A site to provide non-judgmental guidance on choosing a license for your open source project

item.title: kaminari/kaminari
item.description: ⚡ A Scope & Engine based, clean, powerful, customizable and sophisticated paginator for Ruby webapps

item.title: zdennis/activerecord-import
item.description: A library for bulk insertion of data into your database using ActiveRecord.

item.title: aws/aws-sdk-ruby
item.description: The official AWS SDK for Ruby.

item.title: Shopify/liquid
item.description: Liquid markup language. Safe, customer facing template language for flexible web apps.

item.title: mileszs/wicked_pdf
item.description: PDF generator (from HTML) plugin for Ruby on Rails

item.title: Homebrew/brew
item.description: 🍺 The missing package manager for macOS (or Linux)

item.title: huginn/huginn
item.description: Create agents that monitor and act on your behalf. Your agents are standing by!
